name: bolt-planning
description: Orchestrates Planner and Engineering Manager agents to create and validate Bolt specifications

workflow.phase1: Analyze Current State - determine which Bolts to plan
workflow.phase2: Invoke Planner Agent - decompose features into Bolts
workflow.phase3: Invoke Engineering Manager Agent - validate and approve Bolts
workflow.phase4: Store and Track - save results and update logs

bootstrap.description: Plan BOLT-001 through BOLT-008 from development plan
bootstrap.use_when: Starting from scratch, initial MVP planning

next.description: Plan the next unplanned Bolt based on dependencies
next.output: Next Bolt specification, ready for assignment

feature.description: Plan Bolts for a specific feature

outputs.validation_report: EM approval status for each Bolt

key_decisions.next_bolt_selection: Based on dependencies, priorities, and readiness
key_decisions.complexity_validation: No Bolt exceeds L complexity (split if needed)
key_decisions.acceptance_criteria: Must be objective, testable, Given/When/Then format

success_criteria.em_validation: All Bolts approved or rework requested
success_criteria.readiness: Bolts marked ready for execution assignment

failure_handling.high_complexity: Request Planner to split Bolt into smaller units
failure_handling.circular_dependencies: Request Planner to re-scope and break cycle
failure_handling.missing_ac: Request Planner to add testable acceptance criteria
